steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage points to forms that “straddle the line between prose and poetry,” showing they lack a fixed, clear shape.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content: Choice C, amorphous, means having no definite shape or form, which matches the idea of forms that straddle the line between prose and poetry. The other choices—neutral, customary, and dispersed—do not convey a lack of definite shape. That matches choice C — C is correct.
